cards.title: Auth/session + per-org access hardening
cards.phase: Deferred from Slice 1 (C1). Per-org tenancy/access hardening for the read + write paths — MUST close before go-live (pre-launch: no users, test data only). Specifics in the private repo (ADR 0001).
cards.nextAction: Build the auth/session slice; bind per-org access for the read + write paths (see private ADR 0001).

cards.title: Audit-record immutability hardening
cards.phase: Slice-0 audit (medium). Audit-record immutability follow-up — close before go-live. Specifics in the private repo.
cards.nextAction: Harden audit-record immutability (see the private audit doc / ADR 0001).

cards.title: Pin rule evaluation to the case's stored rules version
cards.phase: Merge-gate NIT (B8): evaluation uses the latest rules version rather than the case's pinned version — identical today; matters after a rules-set change.
cards.nextAction: Pin evaluation to the case's stored rules version.
